allow: Bash(python -c "import ast; import sys; files=[''app/routers/system_stats.py'',''app/routers/project_structure.py'',''app/routers/dropdown_config.py'',''app/routers/reports.py'',''app/routers/advanced_features.py'',''app/routers/task_templates.py'',''app/services/reminder_scheduler.py'',''app/database.py'',''app/utils/error_handlers.py'',''app/utils/encryption.py'',''app/utils/security.py'']; errors=[]; [errors.append\(f\) for f in files if not \(lambda f: \(open\(f\).read\(\), True\)[-1] and ast.parse\(open\(f\).read\(\)\)\)\(f\)]; print\(''All files parse OK'' if not errors else f''Errors: {errors}''\)")
